query:
UPDATE products SET 
affiliateUrl = CASE asin
  WHEN 'SKU182' THEN 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CSN8JNJS?tag=91791709-20'
  WHEN 'SKU183' THEN 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0D7XQMVZL?tag=91791709-20'
  WHEN 'SKU184' THEN 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0D8KPQWXN?tag=91791709-20'

  WHEN 'SKU156' THEN 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0D9XQMVZO?tag=91791709-20'

  WHEN 'SKU158' THEN 'https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0D9XQMVZQ?tag=91791709-20'
